overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in Western attire running through a snowy landscape into a frontier town. The character passes a church and wooden buildings before encountering a horse-drawn carriage on the main street.

agents.ego_description: running along a snow-covered path through sparse woodland toward a distant settlement

entered.detail: snow-covered hillside with sparse trees and rocks
dense pine trees covering the distant hills
wooden buildings visible on the horizon
muddy trail with partial snow cover and wagon tracks
weathered wooden picket fence lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a snow-covered dirt path through sparse woodland, approaching a distant settlement with wooden buildings visible on the horizon. The landscape is open with snow-dusted hills and scattered pine trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential area with church and wooden fences

events.description: enters the town proper with church and wooden buildings becoming visible

agents.ego_description: running through the town's residential area, passing a church and wooden homes

entered.detail: white wooden church with tall steeple and snow-covered roof
small wooden house with snow on the roof and chimney
large deciduous tree with snow-covered branches near the church
wooden telegraph pole with crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The character runs into the town's residential area, passing a prominent church with a steeple on the left and wooden picket fences lining the snow-covered path. The environment transitions from open wilderness to a settled area with buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street with commercial buildings and sheriff's office

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: running along the main street, passing a horse-drawn carriage and approaching commercial buildings

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the street, passing the character on the right

entered.detail: two-story wooden building with SHERIFF sign on the facade
row of wooden storefronts with snow-covered roofs and porches
series of wooden telegraph poles lining the street

segments.scene_description: The character continues onto the main street where commercial buildings including a sheriff's office line the road. A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right, and the character runs alongside it through the muddy, snow-dusted street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character runs from a desolate, snowy wilderness into the heart of a frontier town. It begins on a snow-covered dirt path through sparse woodland, moving past snow-dusted hills and scattered pine trees toward a distant settlement on the horizon. As the character approaches the town, the open landscape transitions into a residential area, passing a prominent church steeple and wooden picket fences. The scene then opens onto the main street, where the terrain shifts to a muddy, snow-dusted road lined with commercial buildings and a sheriff's office. Finally, the camera tracks the character as they run alongside a horse-drawn carriage passing by on the right.
